2. Quickstart

2.2 Sign Up & Set Up

Get started with Mosaic in minutes

Getting started takes less than a minute:
1

Go to edit.mosaic.so

Open edit.mosaic.so in your browser — no downloads or installs needed.
2

Create your account

Sign up using Google or email, then verify your email address.
3

Land on your Canvas

You’ll arrive at your Mosaic Canvas — your visual workspace where all editing happens.
That’s it — no installers, no plugins, no messy setup. You’re ready to build your first workflow.

Next: Explore Your Video Canvas

Learn what you can do on the canvas and how to start editing
